nameMeanings.name: Orm
meanings: Found as a baptismal name. From Ora, name of Hersilia (who married Romulus) as a goddess.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Orm Birthwaite was born in 1098, in Worsborough Common, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 son with Orm Birthwaite. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs. Orm Birthwaite est née en 1098, à Worsborough Common, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Orm Birthwaite. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Orm Birthwaite(은)는 1098년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 워스버루그h 코몬에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Orm Birthwaite(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.
